# viettelidc_vdbs_database_instance (Resource)

ViettelIDC VDatabase Service (VDBS) database instance.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    viettelidc = {
      source = "viettelidc/viettelidc"
    }
  }
}

# The viettelidc_vdbs_database_instance resource does not support creation via Terraform. 
# It must be created via the web console and then imported using 'terraform import'.
# Example usage after import:
resource "viettelidc_vdbs_database_instance" "example" {
  # The ID of the database instance (uuid)
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"

  # The required admin password
  admin_password = "MySuperSecretPassword123!"

  # Manage the state (RUNNING or STOPPED)
  desired_state = "RUNNING"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `admin_password` (String, Sensitive) Administrator password. Write-only — not read back from the API.
- `db_subnet_group_name` (String) Name of the DB subnet group to place the instance in.
- `flavor_id` (String) Flavor (size) ID for the database instance.
- `name` (String) Database instance name.
- `volume_size` (Number) Storage volume size in GB.

### Optional

- `desired_state` (String) Desired operational state: "RUNNING" (default) or "STOPPED". Changing triggers start/stop.
- `parameter_group_name` (String) Name of the parameter group to apply. Optional.
- `promoted` (Boolean) Set to true to promote (go-live) the instance. One-way: cannot revert to false.
- `reboot_trigger` (Number) Increment this value to trigger a reboot of the database instance.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Uses provider default if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Database instance ID assigned by the system.
- `status` (String) Current status of the database instance (e.g. ACTIVE, BUILDING).
